[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An abstract, high-contrast graphic fills the frame with large white splatters and scattered smaller droplets over a dark gray-to-black background.

Main Subject:
The image is dominated by an irregular burst-like shape in white at the center, with multiple radiating splashes, drips, and scattered dots surrounding it.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a digital or stylized pattern on a flat background with no real-world setting visible.

Visual Details:
A dark background transitions from medium gray near the center to darker tones toward the edges. Large white forms resemble paint splatters and streaks, including elongated drips on the left side and angular, jagged splashes across the top and right. Smaller white droplets and dots are scattered throughout, especially around the central burst. The composition is tightly cropped, with no borders, and the lighting is purely graphic, with no shadows or depth cues beyond color contrast.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows an abstract paint-splatter style design. White splashes and droplets spread across a dark background in a dense, radial composition.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
